revision.comment: Bot: Create shrine page for Okada Shrine
Text replacement - "is a shrine in the Engishiki Jinmyōchō." to "is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]."
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "| RONSHA ||" to "| {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|WD=Q135022904}}[[Category:RONSHA]] ||"
Text replacement - "Category:RONSHA" to "Category:Shikinai Ronsha"
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (upgraded script - full property sections, ILL links, P361 categorization)
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (V8 - proper ILL deity links, P13677 URLs, province extraction)
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v9.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Okada Shrine (Q135222033)
| native_name = 岡田神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Okada Shrine (Q135222033)
| coordinates = {{coord|34.752763888888886|135.33980277777778}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Okada Shrine'''|岡田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|WD=Q135100459}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Hirota Shrine|en|Hirota Shrine|ja|廣田神社|de|Hirota-Schrein|zh|廣田神社|fr|Hirota-jinja|ru|Хирота-дзиндзя|WD=Q1466105}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {'latitude': 34.752763888888886, 'longitude': 135.33980277777778, 'altitude': None, 'precision': 2.777777777777778e-06, 'globe': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q2'}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Wokatano Shrine|WD=Q135039222}}

[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
[[Category:Shikinai Subshrine]]

{{wikidata link|Q135222033}}

revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Okada Shrine (Q135222033) | native_name = 岡田神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Okada Shrine (Q135222033) | coordinates = {{coord|34.752763888888886|135.33980277777778}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Okada Shrine'''|岡田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shikinai Subshrine|lt=Shikinai Subshrine|WD=Q135100459}}
== part of (P361) ==
* {{ill|Hirota Shrine|lt=Hirota Shrine|de|Hirota-Schrein|en|Hirota Shrine|es|Santuario Hirota|eu|Hirota santutegia|fr|Hirota-jinja|id|Kuil Hirota|it|Santuario di Hirota|ja|廣田神社|ru|Хирота-дзиндзя|zh|廣田神社|WD=Q1466105}}
== coordinate location (P625) ==
* {{coord|34.752763888888886|135.33980277777778}}
== said to be the same as (P460) ==
* {{ill|Q135039222|lt=Q135039222|WD=Q135039222}}
